scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @prediction-market-scanner/core && npm run build -w @prediction-market-scanner/db && npm run build -w @prediction-market-scanner/worker && npm run build -w @prediction-market-scanner/web
scripts.lint: npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck -w @prediction-market-scanner/core && npm run typecheck -w @prediction-market-scanner/db && npm run typecheck -w @prediction-market-scanner/worker && npm run typecheck -w @prediction-market-scanner/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @prediction-market-scanner/core && npm run test -w @prediction-market-scanner/worker
